_meta.purpose: Per-tile mark-flag addresses for TreasureMaster.  Captured via in-game toggle scan.
_meta.schema: maps[mapId].tiles[i].addrs = [[addr_hex, off_hex], ...]  where off is the resting byte value (pre-mark).  status: verified=eyeball-confirmed, partial=<4 hits or unconfirmed, bad=trust-gate failed.
